creator: ady@ady.ro
text:
Source tarball change (timestamp June 01 10:42). The port no longer
builds (mismatched MD5 checksum & one rejected patch)

Fix: Attached to this message there is a gzip-ed diff file that will update
the following files:

  * files/md5: new MD5 checksum file for the source tarball as of June 01
  * patches/patch-ab: fix the patch to apply without fuzz and rejects


PS: I'm still looking for the last maintainer of this port...

--8<--
How-To-Repeat: 
  Build the "imap-uw" port as of June 2nd 1998
